Interview Text:
Dena:

(part 2)

Another time she felt God was again through the kindness of people.
It started on April 9th, 1998 at 12:45 am. She couldn't sleep and was reading in the den. Their power went out. It started sounding like hail and wind in the trees. 

In her words,

"Tornados were coming through our neighborhood. We took the kids to the hall. A huge poplar landed right smack dab on our house, poking a hole right into the middle of it. Water started coming in. Then another tree went through the roof in the boy's room. 

"We basically lived in a forest and we lost so many trees during that storm that basically everything in the backyard was crushed. There were trees and branches everywhere. There was tons of cleanup to do in the yard. 

"My school director came to me asking if his church could do a service project to help. 

We are naturally hesitant to accept help but we agreed to it. I was dropping our son off at school and when I came back, there was a bus in the driveway, people were going back and forth into the backyard, cleaning it out. They even brought us lunch. 

"In the end they had brought out and stacked two huge walls of branches. 

We said, "Thank you for doing this for us." They replied, "Thank you for letting us."
I call them our bus full of angels.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine this as God calling out to you, missing you, wanting you back.
